Summary: 1 duplicate group with 2 invoices in total, with 91287.00 being the total amount in both invoices. This suggests INV-9002 is a duplicate of the invoice INV-7055.

The result shows only the top record (the top duplicate group) out of 1 duplicate group, which contains 2 invoices in total. The actual total count is 1 duplicate group with 2 invoices, with a total amount matching 2 of the invoices shown (91287.00).
